title: OpenSearch Dashboards Saved Objects - Common Definitions
description: Shared type definitions used across all saved object resource schemas.

references.description: Array of saved object references used for relationship tracking.

name.description: Reference name used to map back into the saved object attributes.

type.description: The saved object type of the referenced object (e.g. index-pattern, visualization, search).

id.description: The saved object id of the referenced object.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.description: Metadata for the saved object, including the search source configuration.

searchSourceJSON.description: JSON-serialized search source configuration including index, query, and filter.

gridData.description: Grid layout positioning data for a panel within a dashboard.

w.description: Width of the panel in grid units.

h.description: Height of the panel in grid units.

i.description: Unique panel identifier within the dashboard, must match panelIndex.

display.description: Human-readable display label for the interval (e.g. '10 seconds').

section.description: Section index grouping the interval in the UI picker.

labels.description: Visualization label configuration for axes and legends.

truncate.description: Maximum label length before truncation, or null for no truncation.

annotations.description: Time-based annotation layers overlaid on visualizations.

indexPatternId.description: Index pattern ID used to query annotation events.

color.description: Display color for the annotation marker.

fields.description: Comma-separated field names used for the annotation.

icon.description: Icon identifier for the annotation marker.

query_string.description: Query string filter for annotation events.

time_field.description: Timestamp field used to place annotations on the time axis.

template.description: Mustache template for the annotation tooltip.
